hook.summary: Animated cats jumping over golden eggs with a slot game logo.
hook.visual_action: Two white cats jump and dance in front of a field of golden eggs with lightning bolts against an Asian city backdrop.

scene_flow: Intro with dancing cats and golden eggs over an Asian city background.
Transition to a slot machine interface with various symbols spinning.
The reels land on a full screen of golden eggs, triggering a win.
A cartoon fox character celebrates and vacuums up gold coins.
Final end card with game logo and 'NEW SLOT ALERT!' message.
audience_proxy: Adult social casino players who enjoy Asian-themed slot machines and high-energy animations.
